creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
White space
===========


man /usr/src/sbin/bectl/bectl.8

* appears OK

man -P more 8 bectl

* here, an excess of white space before SEE ALSO
* I guess, I did something wrong, I'll try to fix this for myself. 


     …
     bectl may default to handling both styles and deprecate the various -r
     flags.






SEE ALSO
     libbe(3), beinstall.sh(8), jail(8), zfs(8), zpool(8)
…
